title: BEM-854 verify second retry
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:33 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
reviews=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            relevant='bem852' in low or 'bem849' in low or 'bem846' in low or 'protocol' in low or 'bem845' in low
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=relevant and ('DECISION:' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt)
            if relevant and bad: blockers.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:500]})
            elif ok: reviews.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
if reviews:
    txt=reviews[-1]['text']; up=txt.upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    else: decision='UNKNOWN'
    status='second_retry_review_found_'+decision.lower()
    next_action='finalize protocol' if decision=='APPROVED' else 'apply changes / continue negotiation'
else:
    decision=None
    status='second_retry_review_missing'
    next_action='continue dispatch/watchdog; no operator relay'
state={'bem':'BEM-854','status':status,'decision':decision,'review_paths':[r['path'] for r in reviews[-10:]],'blocker_files':blockers[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem854_verify_protocol_second_retry.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem854_verify_protocol_second_retry.md').write_text('# BEM-854 | Verify Protocol Second Retry | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-854'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+str(decision)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem854_verify_protocol_second_retry.json','governance/reports/bem854_verify_protocol_second_retry.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether Claude final protocol second retry response exists and created next active task/pending before checkpoint')
"""
No issue comments.
